notes: The DATA step that reads NHANES adult obesity prevalence into the eMKF stacked (long) layout. Upstream reads Sample-data-files/nhanes9920obesity.csv via INFILE ... DELIMITER=',' DSD; the same comma-delimited DSD parsing and the full INFORMAT/FORMAT/INPUT block are kept verbatim, with the first 30 real rows of that CSV embedded inline via DATALINES so the bundle runs self-contained. PROC PRINT obs=20 preview as in the example. Exercises numeric/character informats, DSD handling of quoted fields with embedded commas (e.g. 'Black, non-Hispanic'), and fractional timepoints (1999.5).
